# StreamQ Player — streamq.in

> Commercial React video player SDK (@streamq/player) for HLS, DASH, live streaming, and OTT apps.

## Product

- npm package: @streamq/player
- Site: https://streamq.in
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@streamq/player
- License format: sq_live_* (Firestore-validated commercial keys)

## Key pages

- Homepage + live demo: https://streamq.in/
- Pricing & plans: https://streamq.in/#pricing
- Get a license: https://streamq.in/get-started
- Agencies (Studio volume licensing): https://streamq.in/partners
- FAQ: https://streamq.in/#faq

## Pricing (USD)

- Evaluation: Free (public demo key on homepage)
- Player: $49/mo or $499/yr — one production app
- Studio: $199/mo or $1,999/yr — five client keys for agencies
- Premium: $499/mo or $4,999/yr — DRM playback, analytics, white-label

## Capabilities

- HLS, DASH, progressive MP4
- Lazy-loaded hls.js and Shaka Player
- Live streaming, subtitles, cinematic React UI
- Built-in license gating (no Firebase setup in client apps)
- DRM playback on Premium (Widevine, PlayReady, FairPlay via StreamQ backend)

## Contact

- Email: imsazzid@gmail.com
